## Domain outcome

Describe the named capability and owning bounded context.

## Review gates

- [ ] Ubiquitous Language matches the context glossary; any new term has a glossary change.
- [ ] DDD boundaries and Published Language contracts are preserved.
- [ ] Fresh verification evidence is attached.
- [ ] The current HandoffBrief is updated.
- [ ] No unresolved OKF claim remains.
- [ ] No required HITL request is pending.
- [ ] RiskLevel and Project fields are current.
